props.name: sentence
props.description: The text to display with the focus animation.

props.name: separator
props.description: Optional string used to separate words in the sentence.

props.name: manualMode
props.description: Disables automatic animation when set to true.

props.name: blurAmount
props.description: The amount of blur applied to non-active words.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: The color of the focus borders.

props.name: glowColor
props.description: The color of the glowing effect on the borders.

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: The duration of the animation for each word.

props.name: pauseBetweenAnimations
props.description: Time to pause between focusing on each word (in auto mode).
